Phosphate in Blood 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/phosphate-in-blood/ 
Phosphate in Blood 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a phosphate in blood test? 
A phosphate in blood test measures the amount of phosphate in a sample of your blood. Phosphate contains the mineral phosphorus. So, a phosphate test is sometimes called a phosphorus test.
Phosphate is a type of electrolyte . Electrolytes are electrically charged minerals. They help control the amount of fluid and the balance of acids and bas
